videos.title: UK | 05th May, Tuesday - Understanding Risk in Trading: Rift System Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 05th May, Tuesday - Understanding Risk in Trading: Rift System Explained 🚀 Rift Before You Quit — Episode 2 | Understanding Risk the RIGHT Way

In Episode 2 of the Rift Before You Quit series, Shavez (CEO of 3FO) breaks down one of the most misunderstood concepts in trading — risk.

This session goes beyond stop-loss and dives into how risk is actually structured, managed, and executed — the real reason why most traders fail.

🔥 What You’ll Learn in This Episode
⚠️ Why Most Traders Blow Their Accounts
Accounts don’t fail because of bad trades
They fail because of bad trade structure
Over 70–90 percent of traders lose money
Most accounts don’t survive beyond 6 months
🧠 The Real Meaning of Risk
Risk is NOT just stop-loss
Risk = how your capital is exposed across trades
Traditional platforms don’t show:
Total capital at risk
Trade correlation
Risk distribution

👉 They are built for execution, not capital protection

📊 The 3 Types of Traders
Overtraders → Decline
Random discipline → Break-even
Structured traders → Growth

👉 The difference is not skill — it’s structure

💡 Powerful Example Explained
Scenario 1
1 trade using 100 percent of capital
50 percent loss = requires 100 percent gain to recover
Scenario 2
Capital split across 5 trades
Lower risk per trade
Easier recovery and consistency

👉 Same money, completely different outcomes

⚡ Why Risk Distribution Wins
Multiple opportunities instead of one
Losses are smaller and manageable
Lower stress and better decision-making
Higher long-term survival rate
📉 Real Market Data
70–90 percent of traders lose money
Over 50 percent hit major drawdowns
Most never recover because mathematically they are already out

👉 This is not a skill issue — it’s a structural failure

🏦 How Professionals Actually Trade

Hedge funds don’t chase profits — they focus on:

Capital protection
Consistency
Long-term compounding

Typical returns:

8–15 percent annually (normal)
20–30 percent (exceptional)

👉 They win because they stay in the game

🤖 How Rift Solves This Problem

Rift introduces structured execution with:

Fragmented trades (small ticket sizes)
Multiple strategies running simultaneously
Capital distribution across flows
🔄 Three Core Strategies
Conservative
Balanced
Aggressive

👉 Instead of one trade, your capital works across multiple intelligent systems

📈 The Power of Compounding

Even small consistent gains can grow massively:

1–3 percent daily can compound significantly
30 days can exceed 30 percent
90 days can exceed 100 percent

👉 Systems win because they are consistent

⚙️ Key Insight

You are NOT choosing trades
You are choosing behavior and execution structure

🧩 Where Rift Fits

Rift sits between:

Human intention
System execution

It removes emotional mistakes and replaces them with structured logic

🔮 What’s Coming Next

In the next episode:

How the auto trading engine selects trades
The logic behind execution
How AI fits into the system
🚨 New Feature Announcement
⚡ Futures Trading Coming to Rift
Manual trading with full control
Choose assets, leverage, stop-loss, and take-profit
Built on a self-custodial system
No KYC required
Direct access to high-liquidity markets

👉 Designed for advanced users after mastering demo and manual trading

🎯 Final Takeaway

Trading success is not about finding the perfect trade.
It’s about managing risk and surviving long enough to win.

📢 Stay Updated

More insights, features, and deep dives coming in the next sessions.

🔔 Like and Subscribe

Follow for more content on AI trading, automation, and Rift development. 🚀 Rift Before You Quit — Episode 2 | Understanding Risk the RIGHT Way

videos.title: CROSSOVER: Avalanche Keep Wild In Check, Take a 2-0 Series Lead As Series Heads to Minnesota
videos.summary_source_text:
CROSSOVER: Avalanche Keep Wild In Check, Take a 2-0 Series Lead As Series Heads to Minnesota Colorado Avalanche silence the Minnesota Wild with a 5-2 win, seizing a 2-0 series lead as the action shifts to Minnesota. Can the Wild regroup after goalie struggles and special teams woes, or will the Avalanche's relentless offense be too much to handle?

Hosts from Locked On Avalanche and Locked On Wild break down standout performances from Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Scott Wedgewood with sharp insight into Jared Bednar’s coaching adjustments and the Wild’s goaltending shuffle. Key topics include Colorado’s dominant depth scoring, faceoff win advantage, and penalty kill superiority, plus how Minnesota can counter the Avalanche’s aggressive, fast-paced attack. What changes must John Hynes make for the Wild to turn the tide at home—and do the Avalanche look unstoppable in their quest for the cup?

Don’t miss this dynamic playoff breakdown filled with expert analysis and playoff intensity.

videos.title: Hindi | 05th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 05th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 05/05/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 05/05/26

videos.title: Be Patient in Downswing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Be Patient in Downswing #golfswing #golftips Be PATIENT in the downswing
We talk so much about creating a good pivot in the back swing, this will set you up perfectly to create a good transition.
As we start with the lower body, feel your arms to drop down towards your right hip rather than forward towards the golf ball.  The hands will feel like they are dropping more vertically which will help you get in the “slot” and in turn set you up to move the body better through impact.
Follow for more tips from Me and My Golf Be PATIENT in the downswing

videos.title: AI Robots Join Armed SWAT Police And Shock The Public Worldwide
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Robots Join Armed SWAT Police And Shock The Public Worldwide AI robots are moving from labs into real streets. China has already shown humanoid robots walking with SWAT officers, guiding traffic, helping police patrol public areas, and working alongside drones and smart patrol systems. At the same time, cheaper humanoids, advanced robots like KAI, mass-produced home robots like NEO, and Meta’s new robotics push show how fast this shift is getting real.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:34 How China put humanoid robots on the streets with SWAT officers
SOURCE: https://www.facebook.com/frontlinestoriesfromreporters/videos/future-policing-humanoid-robot-joins-police-patrol-on-shenzhen-streetsa-humanoid/2786245985107522/
2:08 Why Guangzhou used robots, drones, and scooters in a smart patrol system
SOURCE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=waFf9YRZuBs
4:01 How Hangzhou deployed humanoid robots to help direct traffic
SOURCE: https://www.globaltimes.cn/page/202605/1360253.shtml
4:52 Unitree Drops Humanoid to $4,290
6:23 KAI: 115 Degrees of Freedom
7:59 1X NEO Hits Mass Production
9:06 Meta Quietly Buys Into Humanoids
9:50 How humanoid traffic robots were used during peak holiday crowds
SOURCE: https://www.scmp.com/video/china/3352391/humanoid-traffic-police-robots-deployed-streets-chinas-tech-hub-hangzhou

🚨 Why It Matters
Humanoid robots are starting to leave controlled demos and enter real public spaces. They are being tested for patrols, traffic control, public messaging, home assistance, and security support. The big shift is that hardware is getting cheaper, AI is getting stronger, and governments and companies are now looking for real-world uses at the same time.

videos.title: Xander Schauffele's caddie breaks down his game at Quail Hollow | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Xander Schauffele's caddie breaks down his game at Quail Hollow | The Drop The PGA TOUR heads to Quail Hollow Club for the Truist Championship, the sixth Signature Event of the season. The last two times this event has been played at Quail Hollow, Xander Schauffele has finished runner-up, and his caddie and longtime friend Austin Kaiser joins us to talk about their experiences at this tournament, the state of Schauffele’s game and their long-term friendship both on and off the course. Looking back at Quail Hollow Club’s history, we parse through stats and trends to determine which hole on the course is most impactful in determining a champion. We go back a week to Miami, where Matt Every spent part of his Tuesday shooting hoops with Sahith Theegala, as Matt chatted up the 28-year-old about how he preps for a tournament week, his injury last year and how his game is coming together in this week’s installment of Every Tuesday. It is a multi-event week on TOUR, so we also dive into a preview of the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic to look at which up-and-comers and which seasoned vets are poised to make a big move in the FedExCup standings.

00:00 Introduction
00:38 Preview for Truist Championship
01:31 Xander Schauffele’s caddie joins 
07:41 FedExCup standings update 
07:54 Most important hole at Quail Hollow 
10:33 Every Tuesday with Sahith Theegala 
16:37 Matt’s pick to win at Quail Hollow 
17:00 Preview for ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic 
18:44 Matt’s pick to win at Myrtle Beach
18:59 Rory McIlroy’s 2021 Truist win
19:39 Hole-in-one at Zurich
20:03 Outro

SUBSCRIBE to PGA TOUR now: http://pgat.us/vBxcZSh

The last two times this event has been played at Quail Hollow, Xander Schauffele has finished runner-up, and his caddie and longtime friend Austin Kaiser joins us to talk about their experiences at this tournament, the state of Schauffele’s game and their long-term friendship both on and off the course. Looking back at Quail Hollow Club’s history, we parse through stats and trends to determine which hole on the course is most impactful in determining a champion. We go back a week to Miami, where Matt Every spent part of his Tuesday shooting hoops with Sahith Theegala, as Matt chatted up the 28-year-old about how he preps for a tournament week, his injury last year and how his game is coming together in this week’s installment of Every Tuesday. It is a multi-event week on TOUR, so we also dive into a preview of the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic to look at which up-and-comers and which seasoned vets are poised to make a big move in the FedExCup standings.

18:59 Rory McIlroy’s 2021 Truist win
19:39 Hole-in-one at Zurich
20:03 Outro

videos.title: Hockey Players Widen Your Stance
videos.summary_source_text:
Hockey Players Widen Your Stance The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: HALL-ELUJAH! Carolina Hurricanes Come Back to Win 3-2 in Overtime in Game 2
videos.summary_source_text:
HALL-ELUJAH! Carolina Hurricanes Come Back to Win 3-2 in Overtime in Game 2 The Carolina Hurricanes take a 2-0 series lead after defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-2 in overtime. It was the first time in all the playoffs that the Hurricanes had to come back from behind. In the end, they came back from 2-0 down to secure the win. What stood out in the game? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Game 2 as a whole. From the early deficit to Nikolaj Ehlers' PPG to the Seth Jarvis and Taylor Hall goals, a lot was going on in the game. Also, Frederik Andersen once again stepped up big, especially after the two goals in 36 seconds. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the first two games of the series and what it means for the Hurricanes as Round 2 shifts to Philadelphia. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing what he could expect in Game 3 with the Flyers down 2-0 and having to come back from the 3-2 loss. Also, who is Zach keeping an eye on as the Hurricanes go on the road for Games 3 & 4? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: I Replaced My $4,000 Golf Bag with TAKOMO… Was It a Mistake?
videos.summary_source_text:
I Replaced My $4,000 Golf Bag with TAKOMO… Was It a Mistake? I Replaced My $4,000 Golf Bag with TAKOMO… Was It a Mistake?

What happens when you ditch a premium, custom-fitted $4,000 golf bag for a set of Takomo irons bought online with no fitting?

In this video, I put direct-to-consumer golf clubs to the ultimate test. Takomo Golf has been blowing up recently, promising tour-level performance at a fraction of the price but can they really compete with the big brands like Titleist, TaylorMade, and Callaway?

I swapped out my entire bag for Takomo clubs and took them straight to the course to find out:

Are Takomo irons actually as good as people say?
Can you play your best golf without a custom fitting?
Is direct-to-consumer golf equipment the future of the game?

If you're considering buying Takomo clubs, wondering whether you need a fitting, or looking to save money on premium golf gear—this is a must-watch.

👉 Inside this video:

Full on-course performance test of Takomo irons
Honest feedback vs premium fitted clubs
Distance, forgiveness, and feel breakdown
The truth about skipping a custom fitting
Who Takomo clubs are REALLY for

videos.title: Keep the Belt Ahead of the Buttons  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Keep the Belt Ahead of the Buttons  #golfswing #golftips A great way to avoid reverse spine angle and improve your body motion is to make sure the belt stays ahead of the buttons throughout the swing. When the chest outraces the lower body, the upper body tilts the wrong way and creates poor rotation patterns. Leading with the belt keeps your hips and torso sequencing correctly, helping you stay in posture and rotate more efficiently. This simple cue creates a better backswing, a cleaner transition, and a more stable downswing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Do This With Your Fingers for 30 Seconds and Feel Your Brain Wake Up | Dr. Mandell Before I explain anything, I want you to feel this in your own body. This simple finger-to-thumb movement may look basic, but it activates powerful connections between your brain and nervous system in seconds. As you move your thumb from one finger to the next, you’re stimulating different areas of the motor cortex and sensory pathways, increasing awareness, coordination, and brain-body communication. Many people notice immediate changes in tension, breathing, focus, or even mental clarity. This is a quick neurological reset you can do anytime to wake up your brain, improve dexterity, and enhance overall function. Try it slowly, try it with your eyes closed, and feel the difference for yourself.

This is a quick neurological reset you can do anytime to wake up your brain, improve dexterity, and enhance overall function. In this live lesson, we worked with Christina, who was dealing with all three — poor contact, weak shots, and inconsistent direction. The interesting part? It wasn’t a downswing issue.

videos.title: This One Iron Tip Would’ve Saved Me Years of Fat Shots
videos.summary_source_text:
This One Iron Tip Would’ve Saved Me Years of Fat Shots Struggling with fat iron shots and inconsistent contact? You are not alone. Most golfers trying to fix fat shots focus on the wrong things and never truly understand how to create clean, compressed strikes.

In this video, I break down the ONE key move that stops fat iron shots instantly and helps you strike the ball first, then the turf exactly how the pros do it.

This is the same move almost every golfer I coach was missing. Once you understand it, you will start hitting crisp irons, better compression and more consistent shots almost immediately.

If you are tired of chunking your irons and want that pure, solid strike every time, this is a must watch

videos.title: The BEST Back Exercise You HAVEN’T Tried
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Back Exercise You HAVEN’T Tried One the best ways to build bigger lats is with a kneeling single arm pulldown, however, not everyone has access to a functional trainer or cable machine. However, a more common piece of equipment you will find in just about any gym and even some well equipped home gyms, is lat pulldown setup.

While lat pulldowns are great builders for the lats, there is something that the single arm pulldown does that the lat pulldown doesn’t — the ability to achieve peak contraction on the lats.

This is due to the fact that the lat pulldown, performed traditionally, has a limited range of motion due to the fixed nature of the bar. That doesn’t mean we can’t get a bette contraction, however.

Simply trade in the traditional lat pulldown for a rocking lat pulldown. The execution is simple, start the movement as you would a traditional lat pulldown, but once you reach the height of your head, begin to pull favorably with one side. This will allow you to drive your elbow back towards your back pockets; one of the cues used on the single arm pulldown down with a cable setup.

By getting a better contraction, you’re exploring a greater range of motion on the lats that you wouldn’t normally find performing a traditional lat pulldown.

When it comes to building muscle, the entire range of motion is important, not just the lengthened position. Building strength and resiliency throughout the full range of motion of the muscle is also important for preventing injury. Avoiding injury is one of the key factors of training longevity and being able to build muscle as you age so full range of motion should not be ignored.

or more tips on how to build muscle and get bigger lats, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

videos.title: ChatGPT Plus: 10 Features You're Not Using (But Should Be) — 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT Plus: 10 Features You're Not Using (But Should Be) — 2026 Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Most people are using maybe 10% of what ChatGPT Plus can actually do — and paying $20/month for the privilege. In this video, I break down every model, every feature, and every prompting trick I wish someone had told me on day one.

We cover which GPT model to actually pick (GPT-5, 5.3, 5.4 Instant vs Thinking, 5.5 Pro), the hidden tools buried inside Plus, and the prompt engineering tricks that genuinely change the quality of your answers.

Jag åker världens bästa elbil?! Xiaomi SU7 Xiaomi utmanar Tesla och Porsche med teknikfrossa och extrem prestanda.

Xiaomi, ursprungligen kända för sina telefoner, har på kort tid blivit en glödhet aktör på elbilsmarknaden. Med modeller som SU7 och den extrema YU7 Ultra siktar de på att slå konkurrenterna genom sömlös integration mellan mobil, hem och bil, samt prestanda som får etablerade sportbilstillverkare att svettas. Och mycket bra priser. 
Men bakom den imponerande tekniken och de attraktiva priserna finns teknikutmaningar, skandaler  och en byggkvalitet som i vissa fall påminner om Teslas tidiga problem.

Köp Vredesteindäck till riktigt bra pris! Upp till 600 kr, eller upp till 800 kr om du är medlem på kanalen. I Medlemsfilmerna finns mer info.

https://www.vredestein.se/giftcard

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se

06:22 – Tekniska brister: Bromsar och räckvidd under lupp.

videos.title: From Amateur To Pro Level Ball Striking In Minutes! #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno
videos.summary_source_text:
From Amateur To Pro Level Ball Striking In Minutes! #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson Eric Cogorno helps a high handicap golfer fix his over-the-top swing— live on camera.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you. 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to instantly identify whether your club is on plane, under plane, or too far inside during your backswing 
• A golf drill to eliminate the pulls and fades that plague the high handicap golfer  
• Fix your cupped wrist at the top 
• Stop guessing at your golf swing tips and start using the "feel exaggerated, look perfect" principle to know your practice reps are actually doing the right thing 
• Build a repeatable two-part practice routine that compounds real results over weeks and months 
• Apply the same golf swing analysis approach Eric Cogorno uses in live lessons to identify the first broken link in your swing chain and fix it at the source
In this real-time lesson, Eric Cogorno works through a complete golf swing analysis with a student struggling with pulls, fades, and an over-the-top path — two of the most common issues facing any high handicap golfer. Eric diagnoses the root causes (under-plane takeaway and excessive late wrist hinge) and builds a clear, drill-based plan the student can take to the driving range immediately. This is the kind of practical, no-fluff golf instruction that turns stalled games into real improvement..

videos.title: My NEW In The Golf Bag is Game Changing
videos.summary_source_text:
My NEW In The Golf Bag is Game Changing If you told me a few years ago that my golf bag would look like this, I would have laughed.

But things are changing. My swing is evolving, my body is getting stronger, and my ball speeds are climbing. To bridge the gaps in my game and prepare for my goal of competing in a Senior Tour event, I headed to the Srixon Performance Centre to work with their top tour fitters.

The result? A setup that might shock you.

In this video, I’m walking you through my entire 2026 In The Bag (WITB). We’re talking about why I’ve officially ditched my hybrids for utility irons, why I’m choosing "Game Improvement" irons over tour blades, and the driver setup that is giving me 157+ MPH ball speeds.

Whether you’re a gear head or just looking to fix the gaps in your own bag, there’s a lesson here: stop playing the clubs you think you should play, and start playing the ones that actually help you score.

In this video, you’ll see:

The "Ego" Irons: Why the Srixon ZXi Game Improvement irons are staying in the bag.
The Hybrid Killer: Why the ZXU 2-iron is more reliable for high-speed players.
Driver Tech: The truth about shaft weight (50g vs 60g) and stability.
The Putter "Ting": My surprising switch to a counterbalance mallet.

Are you a Hybrid or a Utility Iron player? Let me know in the comments!


FREE Golf Swing 101 Class here: https://www.markcrossfieldgolf.com/how-to-play-golf-101

NOW AVAILABLE ONLINE LESSONS WITH MARK CROSSFIELD, check out his packages here: https://skillest.com/coach/markcrossfield

videos.title: The #1 Magnesium Mistake Everyone Makes
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Magnesium Mistake Everyone Makes If you’re taking magnesium for sleep or muscle cramps and notice it’s not working, you could be making one of these common magnesium mistakes. Learn how to take magnesium correctly for the most magnesium benefits. Your health will thank you.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: Magnesium mistakes 
0:14 Magnesium dosage 
1:03 Magnesium RDA explained
3:29 Magnesium types explained 
4:58 The best magnesium supplement 
7:04 Magnesium deficiency symptoms  
14:01 Correcting magnesium deficiency and magnesium benefits 

Magnesium and Glutamate: 
https://youtu.be/OxCWlEJMS2U
https://youtu.be/CUY90EaVgXg 

Learn how to easily spot a magnesium deficiency and how to select the best magnesium supplements: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/7lSQ2hnycLg
▶️ https://youtu.be/vJFozt4pytg
▶️ https://youtu.be/1gGI_98xzgE

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4uN8yfF

The average recommended dose of magnesium is 350–420 mg, but this was never meant to optimize brain and nervous system function. It’s the bare minimum to prevent deficiency, not support optimal health.

The form of magnesium matters. Many supplements use magnesium oxide, which has very low absorption and can limit results.

Magnesium glycinate is one of the best forms, with high absorption and better tolerance for the digestive system.

Only about 1% of magnesium is found in the blood, making deficiency difficult to detect with standard blood tests. An RBC magnesium test is slightly better, but still not fully accurate.

To support healthy magnesium levels, take 300–400 mg of magnesium glycinate a few times per day. This can help support blood pressure, reduce palpitations, and improve sleep.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: The GREATEST putter ever made...🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
The GREATEST putter ever made...🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.

videos.title: I bought a cheap ‘550hp’ Bentley, it was a DISASTER!
videos.summary_source_text:
I bought a cheap ‘550hp’ Bentley, it was a DISASTER! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0505

Did Mat make a huge mistake buying a Bentley Continental GT for just £10,200?

In this video, we’re putting our bargain-basement Bentley head-to-head with a pristine, well-maintained version of the exact same car, but this one is worth £30,000! Is the "mint" example really worth three times the price, and if so, is it worth Mat pouring in the cash to get our car to the same level?

Well, here’s the thing: we already know from a previous video that there are a whole load of issues with our car. We need to replace the front suspension, replace the handbrake motors, change warped brakes, and it also needs a major service and a new MOT. All in, the fix everything, it would cost over £25,000 to fix them all! 

What’s more, the 6-litre W12 should be producing 550hp, but in this instance ours is only putting down 320hp, so to get it back to producing what it should would cost an additional £8,000!

So we now have a massive decision to make. Do we cut our losses or double down? Here is how we tackle this dilemma:

For starters, we see how much the car is worth if we simply strip it and sell it in pieces. We then get the car professionally valeted to see if "looking the part" is enough to fool a specialist when compared to the £30k version, and then finally we attempt to fix only the bare essentials required to get it road-legal.

Can you actually save £20,000 by buying a "fixer-upper" Bentley, or did we just buy a very heavy, very expensive paperweight? Stick with Mat to find out!

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/flyingspares for helping us with this video! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0505

Find out the real reasons why lemon water is the best beverage to drink every day. Most people don’t know about #5!

0:00 Introduction: The real reason to drink lemon water every day
0:18 Benefit #1 - Reduces a fatty liver
1:07 Benefit #2 - Reduces high cholesterol 
1:28 Benefit #3 - Helps with weight loss
2:26 Benefit #4 - Has anti-aging effects
3:00 Benefit #5 - Has anticancer effects

4:07 Benefit #7 - Contains vitamin C
5:08 Benefit #8 - Supplies phytonutrients 
5:37 Key takeaways 

In this video, we’re going to talk about the real reason why you should be drinking lemon water every day. 

Aside from tasting great and refreshing the body, lemon water has some incredible health benefits—especially when paired with Healthy Keto and intermittent fasting. 

Take a look at these eight benefits of drinking lemon water every day: 
1. Potentially helps reduce liver fat
2. Reduces high cholesterol 
3. Helps with weight loss
4. Has anti-aging effects
5. Has anticancer effects
6. Reduces kidney stones
7. Contains vitamin C
8. Supplies phytonutrients 

As you can see, having lemon water every day can have some incredible benefits. For additional benefits, you can also add a couple of tables spoons of apple cider vinegar. 

Lemon water is great to have while you’re on a Healthy Keto and intermittent fasting plan.

videos.title: UK | 04th May, Monday -RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 04th May, Monday -RIFT Presentation 04/05/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 04/05/26

videos.title: Will Either Goalie Have a Short Lease In Game 2 After the 15 Goal Game 1?
videos.summary_source_text:
Will Either Goalie Have a Short Lease In Game 2 After the 15 Goal Game 1? Colorado Avalanche face goalie questions after wild 15-goal Game 1 shootout against the Minnesota Wild. Will either team make a change in net for Game 2, or simply rely on a short leash for their starters? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down postgame reactions from Jared Bednar and John Hynes, examine Scott Wedgewood and Jesper Wallstedt’s resilience, and debate whether a goaltending switch or stronger defense is key for both clubs moving forward.

The conversation also spotlights standout performances, including Trent Miner's heroics with the Colorado Eagles in the Calder Cup playoffs, and dissects the race for the Bill Masterton Trophy with Gabriel Landeskog, Jonathan Toews, and Rasmus Dahlin as finalists. Predictions for Game 2, listener insights, and the impact of defensive adjustments take center stage as the Avalanche aim to build momentum in this high-octane playoff matchup.

videos.title: Control Starts with This Habit
videos.summary_source_text:
Control Starts with This Habit Silence can feel uncomfortable at first, especially when the instinct is to stay busy and keep moving. But over time, it builds the ability to focus and direct attention with intention. Instead of reacting to every thought, awareness becomes something that can be guided. This is where real control begins, not by doing more, but by learning to be still.

videos.title: Your Mohawk 10-2 Is Wrong Without This Order
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Mohawk 10-2 Is Wrong Without This Order The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Eat This Before Bed — Watch What Happens to Your Hunger, Blood Sugar & Sleep | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat This Before Bed — Watch What Happens to Your Hunger, Blood Sugar & Sleep | Dr. Mandell If you’re craving something sweet at night but don’t want to spike your blood sugar or disrupt your sleep, this simple mug cake is a smarter choice. Made with low-carb, nutrient-dense ingredients like almond flour, egg, cocoa, and healthy fats, this quick dessert works with your body instead of against it by helping slow digestion, support satiety, and provide a more stable release of energy. It’s a great alternative to late-night sugar and may help reduce cravings while supporting better metabolic balance. This is not about overeating dessert, it’s about making a better choice that aligns with your body. Try it tonight and pay attention to how your hunger, energy, and sleep respond.

🥣 INGREDIENTS (Base Recipe)
3 tablespoons almond flour
(or 1 tablespoon coconut flour)
1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa powder
1 egg
1 tablespoon melted butter or coconut oil
1 to 2 teaspoons monk fruit sweetener or stevia (adjust to taste)
¼ teaspoon baking powder
Optional: ½ teaspoon vanilla extract
🔥 INSTRUCTIONS
Add all ingredients into a mug or clear glass bowl
Mix thoroughly until smooth
Microwave for 60 to 90 seconds
Do not overcook, keep center slightly soft for best texture
🍫 OPTIONAL ADD-INS & TOPPINGS
Chopped pecans or walnuts
Dark chocolate chips (85% or sugar-free)
Fresh berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
Cinnamon
Nut butter (almond, peanut, or cashew)

If you don’t have a microwave, you can absolutely use the oven. Just place it in an oven safe dish at about 300 to 325 degrees and warm it for around 10 to 15 minutes until it thickens slightly and is warm, not hot. Keep an eye on it so it doesn’t overcook. You can also just let it sit in the refrigerator for 20 to 30 minutes or overnight and it will naturally thicken without any heat at all.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: 🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar.
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar. 🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar. Delicious, quick, and incredibly easy. Enjoy making it with a smile and a great mood!

3/4 cup (100 g) rolled oats. 1/4 cup (50 g) chia seeds.
1 banana.
1 cup (240 ml) coconut cream.
1/4 cup (50 g) sugar‑free peanut butter.

videos.title: Every Putt Given vs Auto 300 Yard Drive | Who Wins? (Peter Finch vs Ryan Ruffels)
videos.summary_source_text:
Every Putt Given vs Auto 300 Yard Drive | Who Wins? (Peter Finch vs Ryan Ruffels) This might be the most unbalanced golf match we’ve ever played…

I get every putt inside 12ft conceded — no pressure on the greens at all.
Ryan Ruffels (tour pro) starts every hole from 300 yards down the middle.

Sounds fair, right?

We put it to the test to see which advantage actually wins over 18 holes… and the result isn’t quite what you’d expect.

Let us know in the comments — who should win this?

For more info on my clothes and equipment in this video, check them out here: https://linktr.ee/finchgolfmedia

videos.title: I played with the NEW McLaren Golf Clubs!
videos.summary_source_text:
I played with the NEW McLaren Golf Clubs! I’m taking the new McLaren golf clubs out for a proper test, playing 9 holes on the course to see if they actually live up to the hype.

I’ve already reviewed these on the HIT channel, but that was more of a first look. This time, I wanted to see how they perform in real conditions. No simulator, no perfect lies just real golf.

Throughout the round, I’ll be sharing my honest thoughts on the feel, distance, forgiveness, and whether they’re something I’d recommend to the audience.

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!
UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

MORE FROM ME
🎙 Podcast — The Rick Shiels Golf Show
https://www.youtube.com/@RickShielsGolfShow
🏌️‍♂️Golf equipment reviews — H.I.T Golf
Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. I’m taking the new McLaren golf clubs out for a proper test, playing 9 holes on the course to see if they actually live up to the hype.

I’ve already reviewed these on the HIT channel, but that was more of a first look. This time, I wanted to see how they perform in real conditions. No simulator, no perfect lies just real golf.

videos.title: Enkla nattjästa frallor - mitt populäraste recept
videos.summary_source_text:
Enkla nattjästa frallor - mitt populäraste recept Nattjästa frallor man lätt rör iho och sen belönas man med nygräddat bröd på morgonen!

660 g vetemjöl (1 liter och 1 dl)
2 tsk salt
0.5 liter vatten
25 g färsk jäst (eller 6 g torr jäst)
En skvätt olivolja

Bakbordet är från Kockums Jernverk.
Stora modellen (den i videon): https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/tillbehor-2/bakbord-80x60-cm
Mindre modellen: https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/tillbehor-2/bakbord-60x48-cm

Bakstålet jag har i ugnen:

videos.title: K64. Fattigveckan: Jimmy levde på 100 kr i en vecka och livet blev rikare
videos.summary_source_text:
K64. Fattigveckan: Jimmy levde på 100 kr i en vecka och livet blev rikare Vad händer om du lever på 100 kronor mat i veckan, sover på golvet och bara får använda internet på biblioteket? Jimmy Andersson (@FireJimmy) hörde av sig till oss efter att ha blivit inspirerad att prova att göra en fattigvecka. Budgeten för veckan var 100 kr till mat, begränsad internetdelning, endast cykel som transportmedel och begränsad tillgång till internet. Caroline har provat en lightversion av utmaningen och delar sina perspektiv på utmaningen.

Personligen blev jag inte taggad alls efter att ha lyssnat på Jimmy och Caroline :rofl: Men jag förstår andemeningen med att verkligen ifrågasätta vad som är ett rikt liv för en själv. Likt Nassim Taleb brukar prata om “via negativa” - alltså förbättring genom borttagning. Se det här avsnittet som insyn i ett experiment och dela gärna dina tankar om avsnittet i kommentarerna.

5 guldkorn från avsnittet:
▸  Hundra kronor mat för hela veckan - Jimmy levde på ärtsoppa, havregrynsgröt, spagetti och knäckebröd — allt handlat på en gång för exakt hundra kronor. Mot slutet var det så tråkigt att han inte ens åt upp allt.

▸  Caroline klarade fyra dagar - hon gav upp inte av hunger utan för att hon saknade det som faktiskt betyder något för henne: kaffe, frukt, en ordentlig dusch och sin hudvård. Det var insikten i sig — att hon nu visste vad som spelade roll.

▸  Man kan inte simulera verklig fattigdom - Jimmys viktigaste insikt: det experimentet inte kan återskapa är den psykologiska otryggheten. Han vet hur det känns på riktigt — att leva på strax under hyran i A-kassa och inte veta när det tar slut. Den rädslan går inte att kopiera med en planerad vecka.

▸  Tacksamheten efteråt är verklig - Båda beskriver samma känsla när veckan var slut: en nästan överraskande uppskattning för det vanliga. Carolines ord: “Gud vad privilegierad jag är.”

▸  Light-versionen funkar också - Caroline rekommenderar att man anpassar utmaningen efter sig själv. Välj de begränsningar som faktiskt utmanar just dig, kör i tre dagar istället för sju om det känns mer rimligt. Effekten — perspektivet — brukar komma ändå.

Vi hoppas att du gillar avsnittet!
Jan, Caroline och Jimmy

Länkar:
====
▸ Jimmys bok Arbetsfri på Adlibris: https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/arbetsfri-9789189888258
▸ Jimmys Facebook sida: Det Gråa Guldet: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100032084246604
▸ Diskussion till avsnittet i forumet: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/120765
https://youtu.be/LaXHzgXfrw4
https://youtu.be/PljsPfEjN5g

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to instantly identify whether your club is on plane, under plane, or too far inside during your backswing 
• A golf drill to eliminate the pulls and fades that plague the high handicap golfer  
• Fix your cupped wrist at the top 
• Stop guessing at your golf swing tips and start using the "feel exaggerated, look perfect" principle to know your practice reps are actually doing the right thing 
• Build a repeatable two-part practice routine that compounds real results over weeks and months 
• Apply the same golf swing analysis approach Eric Cogorno uses in live lessons to identify the first broken link in your swing chain and fix it at the source
In this real-time lesson, Eric Cogorno works through a complete golf swing analysis with a student struggling with pulls, fades, and an over-the-top path — two of the most common issues facing any high handicap golfer. Eric diagnoses the root causes (under-plane takeaway and excessive late wrist hinge) and builds a clear, drill-based plan the student can take to the driving range immediately. This is the kind of practical, no-fluff golf instruction that turns stalled games into real improvement..

videos.title: Do NOT Take Accutane Until You Watch This
videos.summary_source_text:

Welcome to the Mark Crossfield Golf channel, your ultimate destination for all things golf! Whether you're a beginner just learning how to swing a golf club or a seasoned golfer aiming to refine your golf swing, this channel is here to help you master every aspect of your golf swing. With a blend of expert golf instruction, golf tips, practical golf lessons and honest equipment reviews, Mark Crossfield provides you with everything you need to play your best golf.

At Mark Crossfield Golf, we know that mastering your golf swing and perfecting your golf grip are fundamental to becoming a better golfer. Our videos dive deep into the essentials of a solid golf swing, teaching you how to swing a golf club with precision and power. From golf swing basics to advanced golf swing drills and techniques, we cover it all. Learn the importance of a proper golf grip. Whether you're looking to improve your golf swing takeaway or refine your golf swing tempo, we have the expert golf instruction you need.

Our channel offers a wide range of golf lessons tailored to golfers of all skill levels. If you're new to the game, our beginner golf content will guide you through the fundamentals, including the golf grip, golf stance, and how to execute a consistent golf swing. For more experienced players, we provide advanced golf lessons on topics like ball striking and perfecting your golf swing. Each golf lesson is designed to be practical and actionable, so you can apply what you learn directly on the golf course and start seeing results.

Choosing the right equipment is crucial for any golfer. We provide thorough reviews of the best drivers and best irons to help you make informed decisions. Whether you're searching for the best drivers for beginners or looking for high-performance golf clubs that can take your game to the next level, our reviews cover all the top options. Learn about the latest golf technology and discover which equipment is best suited for your game style. Our videos also explore how to use golf launch monitors and other golf training aids to improve your performance.

Every golfer knows that small adjustments can make a big difference. Our channel offers a wealth of golf swing tips designed to help you improve every part of your golf game. Learn how to hit the driver straight, avoid common mistakes, and develop a strategy for better golf shots. We provide detailed advice on mastering your short game and putting, ensuring you're equipped with the skills needed to lower your scores. From fixing your slice to hitting longer drives, our golf swing tips are here to help you play smarter and more efficiently.

Understanding the mechanics of your golf swing is key to improvement. Our slow motion golf swing analysis breaks down each part of the swing, helping you identify areas for refinement. By performing slow motion golf swing analysis, you can make precise adjustments that lead to more consistent and powerful golf shots. This in-depth approach to golf instruction is ideal for golfers who want to understand the finer points of their golf swing and improve their overall technique.

At Mark Crossfield Golf, we believe in building a community of passionate golfers. Join us as we explore every aspect of golf, from golf swing basics to golf lessons for advanced players. We encourage you to leave comments, ask questions, and share your experiences. Our community is all about learning, growing, and enjoying the game of golf together. By engaging with our content, you'll gain access to the best golf tips, golf lessons, golf swing advice and equipment reviews available.
Don’t miss out on the latest videos designed to help you improve your golf swing. videos.title: Kimi Wins... But Are McLaren Closer? | 2026 Miami GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Kimi Wins... But Are McLaren Closer? | 2026 Miami GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by F1 correspondent Lawrence Barretto and F1TV expert James Hinchcliffe to reflect on an action-packed Miami Grand Prix weekend. 

Kimi Antonelli made it three race wins in a row to extend his championship lead to 20 points. Was this the toughest win of Kimi’s career and what does that tell us about him? 

On the other side of the Mercedes garage, how will George Russell be feeling about the title fight after losing out to his teammate again? And what do the guys make of George’s comments about the Miami track not suiting him? 

Also on the agenda: why Lando Norris missed out on victory, Charles Leclerc’s final lap spin that cost him a podium, Red Bull’s turnaround and a very special day for Franco Colapinto. 

Plus, the guys pay tribute to former F1 driver and Paralympian Alex Zanardi, who has passed away at the age of 59. 

00:00 - Kimi's most impressive win?
12:08 - How can George hit back?
17:35 - McLaren's missed chance
24:28 - Ferrari's upgrade frustration
34:18 - Red Bull's big turnaround
39:09 - Franco feels the love
43:10 - Relief at Williams
48:25 - Remembering 'incredible human' Alex Zanardi

For more F1® videos, visit: https://www.Formula1.com

videos.title: LOGAN SMYTHEKOVEN! Carolina Hurricanes Take 1-0 Series Lead After 3-0 Shutout Win
videos.summary_source_text:
LOGAN SMYTHEKOVEN! Carolina Hurricanes Take 1-0 Series Lead After 3-0 Shutout Win The Carolina Hurricanes take a 1-0 series lead after winning 3-0 against the Philadelphia Flyers on Saturday night. The second line dominates again, and Frederik Andersen continues to play lights-out hockey. What stood out in the win? What should we expect for Game 2? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 1 shutout win. What stood out in the game that saw the second line dominate again, Andersen being a brick wall, and a total of 68 PIMs given out? Who impressed Zach the most over the course of Game 1? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on who he thinks will be the front-runners of the Conn Smythe trophy. Does Logan Stankoven make a better case than Andersen or vice versa? Who has the edge through five games? Finally, Zach concludes the show with a brief preview of Monday night's Game 2 in Raleigh. What should fans expect, and who is Zach looking at to make an impact? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche Win in Chaotic Game 1 Against the Minnesota Wild
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Win in Chaotic Game 1 Against the Minnesota Wild Colorado Avalanche outlast Minnesota Wild in a wild 9-6 shootout—has a new playoff rivalry been born? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down an unforgettable, high-scoring Game 1, where Cale Makar overcame a first-period injury to net two crucial goals and the Avalanche set a franchise playoff record for most goals in a game. With standout offensive contributions from Nathan MacKinnon, Devon Toews, and Martin Nečas, Colorado’s firepower was on full display—but at what defensive cost?

The hosts spotlight defensive lapses, questions in goal for both squads, and Minnesota's impressive ability to erase a 3-0 deficit and briefly take the lead. Listeners get analysis on the Avalanche’s need for tighter defensive play, key moments like the devastating shorthanded goal, and the adjustments Jared Bednar’s squad must make for Game 2. Was this just a playoff anomaly, or is another goal-filled battle ahead? Don’t miss this fast-paced playoff breakdown.

videos.title: Google Just Dropped COSMO Then Mysteriously Pulled It
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Just Dropped COSMO Then Mysteriously Pulled It Google quietly dropped a mysterious new AI app called COSMO, then pulled it within hours. The app looked like an experimental Android assistant that could run with Gemini Nano, connect to remote AI, and potentially interact with what is happening on your screen. At the same time, Gemini may be getting a new Omni video model, DeepMind is testing an AI co-clinician, OpenAI updated Codex with animated pets and workflow tools, Anthropic is testing Claude Jupiter, and Mistral’s new model is getting criticized.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:30 Google’s mysterious COSMO AI app appearing and disappearing within hours
SOURCE: https://9to5google.com/2026/05/01/google-cosmo-assistant/
2:09 COSMO Features & Pull
2:33 Gemini’s possible new Omni video model leak before Google I/O
SOURCE: https://www.testingcatalog.com/google-is-testing-new-omni-model-for-video-generation-ahead-of-i-o/
4:09 Google DeepMind testing an AI co-clinician for doctors and telemedicine
SOURCE: https://deepmind.google/blog/ai-co-clinician/
5:20 AI Telemedicine Tests — "The most futuristic part was telemedicine."
6:24 OpenAI adding animated pets and workflow features to Codex
SOURCE: https://www.engadget.com/2162796/openai-introduces-ai-generated-pets-for-its-codex-app/
8:11 Anthropic red-teaming a new Claude Jupiter build before its event
SOURCE: https://www.testingcatalog.com/anthropic-tests-jupiter-v1-p-before-potential-launch-on-may-6/
9:13 Mistral Medium three point five launching with agent tools and backlash
SOURCE: https://mistral.ai/news/vibe-remote-agents-mistral-medium-3-5/

🚨 Why It Matters
Google may be testing a much deeper phone assistant that can understand your device, switch between local and cloud AI, and work across apps. COSMO disappearing so fast makes it feel like something went public too early, while Gemini Omni, OpenAI Codex, Claude Jupiter, and Mistral show how fast the AI race is moving.

These are the seven biggest health mistakes I made, and I’m sharing them so you don’t have to go through years of fatigue, pain, and frustration like I did.

I hope you learn from my mistakes instead of repeating them. These lessons can prevent years of misery, confusion, and wasted effort.

This £200 Device Could Change Golf FOREVER Rick puts the Shot Scope LM1 launch monitor to the test on the course and range, breaking down its accuracy, ease of use, and whether it really delivers for the price. From club speed to carry distance, see how it performs in real-world conditions and in the studio. We find out if this compact device is a game-changer or just another golf gadget.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: The Rasmus Dahlin Mechanic Even Cale Makar Can't Replicate
videos.summary_source_text:
The Rasmus Dahlin Mechanic Even Cale Makar Can't Replicate The Rasmus Dahlin Mechanic Even Cale Makar Can't Replicate

This week’s free lesson on YouTube we look at something Rasmus Dahlin does that even Cale Makar and Quinn Hughes don't really use the same way. Makar is famous for his 10-and-2’s, where his hips rotate open and he releases off the inside hip almost instantly. That's a quick-release mechanic, and it's incredible at what it does.

But Dahlin is doing something different at the blue line when he is quarterbacking the powerplay. He gets into that same internally rotated position, with his toes turned inwards and the puck cocked back behind him, and instead of releasing, he holds it. He holds it long enough for F1 to turn his toecaps and lose his angle on his push down the wall. Dahlin's stance forces the penaltykiller out of position. The reason most players never use this position is that it feels fragile. It looks like you have no power, no balance, and nowhere to go. But that's exactly the illusion, because your body is actually coiled, the puck is loaded behind you, and your skates are pointed in the direction you're about to attack. The defender sees the loaded puck and the rotated hips and assumes you're about to make a play to one side, when in reality your line of travel is the opposite direction. 

This is why we lean so hard on shared language at Train 2.0. The moment you can call something "internal hip rotation" and pair it with what it looks like in a Dahlin clip, you can actually access the movement. Without the language, the mechanic stays invisible to you, even when you're watching it happen ten times a game. 

If you want to start working on this and the rest of the foundation, the free Downhill Skating training is the right place to begin. It's the same system we use to compare your video to elite NHLers and coach you into their mechanics.

1:45 — Dahlin in action: getting the defender to bite.

3:10 — Free Downhill Skating training.

videos.title: Can't Lose Your "Love Handles"? (THIS ALWAYS WORKS)
videos.summary_source_text:
Can't Lose Your "Love Handles"? (THIS ALWAYS WORKS) Love handles won’t disappear from side bends, crunches, or wishful thinking. If you want to lose love handles and finally reveal a leaner, more sculpted waistline, this video breaks down the 5 steps you need to start getting rid of stubborn fat around the waist and building a better looking midsection.

The first step, as always, starts with nutrition. There are no shortcuts that allow you to avoid lowering your overall body fat if your goal is to see sharper obliques, a tighter waist, and a more ripped core. The good news is, this does not have to be overly complicated. I’m going to give you a simple starting point you can use right away to begin dropping body fat and shrinking the love handles.

Incinerate the Love Handles Here - http://athleanx.com/x/no-more-love-handles
Subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

First, stand in front of the mirror and see if you can make out the top row of your abs. They don’t need to be deeply carved or perfectly visible. If you can see even a faint outline of that top row, multiply your bodyweight by 15 to estimate your target daily calorie intake. If you cannot see them at all, multiply your bodyweight by 12 to create a slightly more aggressive calorie starting point.

Stay consistent with that calorie target for the next two weeks and track whether your weight is moving in the right direction. If it is not, reduce your intake by another 200 calories per day or so, with 500 calories being the most aggressive adjustment I would recommend, then reassess again. Once the scale and your body fat start trending down, you know you have found the right starting point and can continue working toward a leaner waist.

The second step is using activity to support your calorie deficit. This is where you increase your total daily calorie burn without forcing all of the progress to come from cutting more food. For most people, walking is the smartest and most sustainable form of activity for improving the waistline. It is easy to recover from, low impact, and something you can do more consistently, which makes it more powerful over the course of a full week.

Running can be too demanding on the joints for many people, especially those carrying extra body fat, and it often becomes less sustainable because of the higher effort and recovery cost required to keep doing it consistently.

The third step is one most people completely overlook. Instead of only thinking about ab exercises or exercises for the love handles, think about the visual impact of building broader shoulders and a wider back. When your delts and lats are more developed, your waist instantly appears narrower by comparison. This is where exercises like lateral raises for the middle delts and pulldowns or straight arm pushdowns for the lats become important.

Choosing the right exercises matters here, and I show you the specific ones that are going to help create that more tapered, athletic look.

Next, we can finally turn the attention to the abs themselves. The key is not just doing more ab exercises, but choosing the right ones. Top down ab movements, where your shoulders move toward your pelvis, are often easier to perform correctly and can help develop the upper abs that you are most likely to see first as your body fat starts to drop.

Remember, men tend to lose body fat in a top down pattern. This means you will usually see your abs before the love handles fully disappear. Training the abs along the way helps keep you motivated because you can start seeing progress before the last stubborn fat around the waist is gone.

Finally, you need to train the obliques. Do not avoid oblique exercises because you are afraid they will give you a blocky waist. That is one of the biggest mistakes people make. A well developed set of obliques is part of what makes the waist look athletic, sharp, and complete once the body fat comes off. The key is using the right rotational ab exercises, like the ones shown in this video, so the waist looks tighter and more defined.

Use this simple 5 step approach if you want to burn fat, lose love handles, and build a more sculpted waistline for good. When you are ready for a complete workout program and meal plan that removes all of the guesswork, head to athleanx.com and get the ATHLEAN-X Training System.

For more videos on how to lose love handles, get rid of stubborn fat around the waist, build ripped abs, and reveal a leaner midsection, make sure to subscribe to our channel through the link above and turn on your notifications so you never miss a new video. videos.title: Did Google Just Sell Out?!
videos.summary_source_text:
Did Google Just Sell Out?! Is Google selling out?

Google just signed a massive deal with the Pentagon to use its AI for classified information. This directly contradicts the ethical boundaries they set when they bought DeepMind back in 2014, and over 600 of their own employees are actively begging them not to do it.

But with the government holding the keys to the future of AI legislation and contracts, my take is that Google was kind of in a no-win situation. 

What do you think? Should they have held the line like Anthropic, or is this the right business move?

#AI #Ainews #Google #deepmind Is Google selling out?

Google just signed a massive deal with the Pentagon to use its AI for classified information. This directly contradicts the ethical boundaries they set when they bought DeepMind back in 2014, and over 600 of their own employees are actively begging them not to do it.

But with the government holding the keys to the future of AI legislation and contracts, my take is that Google was kind of in a no-win situation. 

What do you think? Should they have held the line like Anthropic, or is this the right business move?

#AI #Ainews #Google #deepmind

videos.title: Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open Highlights from the final round of the 2026 Turkish Airlines Open, where the battle for the title was decided on the final stretch. 

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

There's plenty at stake for DP World Tour members as the Asian Swing reaches its climax this week at the Turkish Airlines Open. The eyes of the golfing world turn to Antalya, with Belek's National Golf Club, located within Regnum Hotels, taking on host venue duties for the first time for Türkiye's national open. Players representing 32 countries are set to tee it up, reinforcing the globality of the DP World Tour and the opportunities it provides. No fewer than seven winners so far this season are among the 156-player field, including the returning Jayden Schaper from South Africa, who at third is the highest ranked player in the Race to Dubai standings following his back-to-back wins at the tail end of 2025. While relatively young, the Turkish Airlines Open has played a significant role in the expansion of the DP World Tour’s international footprint. From its inception in 2013, when Tiger Woods made an appearance, the event quickly became a popular stop for players.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/ Highlights from the final round of the 2026 Turkish Airlines Open, where the battle for the title was decided on the final stretch. 

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe
